title: Custom Elytra ResourcePack
description: Official ResourcePack of Custom Elytra DataPack
body:
Show off any Elytra skin you want without having the cape. Just rename it in an anvil.

Optfine is **NOT** needed!

This Pack allows you to use any Elytra texture you want by renaming the item in an anvil.

# Download:
Both [**DataPack**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/custom-elytra-dp) **AND** ResourcePack (this) are necesary to use this Pack.
Download the DataPack into your world's datapacks folder and the ResourcePack into your resourcepacks folder.

# Use:
Take any Elytra and rename it with any of the available options below.\
It's very important you spell it identically.

## Options available:
![Elytra options ordered as the list below.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/172c803a2fc9cbf708673ab839402c0edcdb4ba8.png)
- Anniversary 15
- Birthday
- Cherry Blossom
- Cobalt
- Common
- dB
- Experience
- Followers
- Founders
- Home
- Jack Black Blue
- Jack Black Gray
- Jack Black Red
- MCC 15
- Menace
- Migration
- Millonth Customer
- Minecon 2011
- Minecon 2012
- Minecon 2013
- Minecon 2015
- Minecon 2016
- Mojang
- Mojang Classic
- Mojang Office
- Mojang Studios
- Mojira
- Oxeye
- Pan
- Prismarine
- Purple Heart
- Realms
- Scrolls
- Snowman
- Spade
- Test
- Translator
- Turtle
- Valentine
- Vanilla
- Yearn

# Back to normal:
You can turn back to normal a renamed Elytra by deleting its name in an anvil.

# Default Elytra texture:
You can use the normal grayish Elytra texture by renaming it **_Default_**.\
This will display its original texture even if you have a cape equipped.\
![Default Elytra skin with cape equipped.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/202de5fb299f68b82fac1e811ace0fe18afaa319.png)
